title: Sweet & Sour
tmdbOverview: Faced with real-world opportunities and challenges, a couple endures the highs and lows of trying to make a long-distance relationship survive.
synopsis: Sweet & Sour is a 2021 drama, romance and comedy film from South Korea. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 14 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
